results.title: Rupee rises 5 paise against US dollar in early trade
results.description: The rupee appreciated 5 paise to 96.11 against the US dollar in early trade on Wednesday, supported by a weaker dollar and positive domestic equities. However, higher crude oil prices, foreign fund outflows and tensions in West Asia limited the currency's gains

results.title: Puri Rath Yatra Tomorrow: From Morning Pahandi To Chariot Pulling, Here’s The Full Schedule
results.description: Puri: The Shree Jagannath Temple Administration has announced the detailed ritual schedule for the much-anticipated Rath Yatra of Lord Jagannath, Lord Balabhadra, and Devi Subhadra, set to take place in Odisha's Pilgrim City of Puri on Thursday (July 16). This iconic festival draws lakhs of devotees to the seaside city, where the deities embark on their annual journey from the...

results.title: Bhai Tera Star Hai | Song - Nach Le Lalariya
results.description: Watch the song 'Nach Le Lalariya' from Hindi movie 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' starring Raghav Juyal, Sanjay Kapoor, Niharika NM and Barkha Singh. 'Nach Le Lalariya' is sung by Jasmine Sandlas and Sudhir Yaduvanshi and music of the song is given by Amit Trivedi. Lyrics of 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' song 'Nach Le Lalariya' are written by Kumaar. 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' also stars Vikalp Mehta, Vivan Bhathena and Chandan Roy Sanyal in pivotal roles. To know more about 'Nach Le Lalariya' song from Raghav Juyal and Sanjay Kapoor starrer 'Bhai Tera Star Hai' watch the video.

results.title: ITR filing 2026: How to access interest certificate from SBI, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, PNB and India Post
results.description: The ITR due date is near and taxpayers are urged to gather important documents, including interest certificates, to ensure accurate reporting of income. Here is a step-by-step guide to download interest certificate from SBI, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, PNB and India Post.

results.title: Parents-to-Be Deepika Padukone And Ranveer Singh Step Out For A Dosa Date At Benne | Filmfare.com
results.description: Deepika Padukone and Ranveer Singh enjoyed a quiet lunch date at Benne in Mumbai, with the parents-to-be keeping it low-key.

results.title: England Recall Brydon Carse for India ODI Series as Pace All-Rounder Returns from Injury
results.description: England have added a crucial member to their current three-match ODI series against India by recalling pace bowling all-rounder Brydon Carse to the squad after his recovery from wrist and elbow injuries. The 30-year-old has been forced to spend several months out of the game, but the England and Wales Cricket Board (ECB) is confident that the right-arm bowler will contribute significantly to the team, as he made three appearances during the Vitality Blast for Durham County. This will provide Eng...
